infoPlist.NSCameraUsageDescription: FAMILIA uses your camera to scan medical documents like lab reports.
infoPlist.NSFaceIDUsageDescription: FAMILIA uses Face ID to unlock the app and protect your health data.
infoPlist.NSPhotoLibraryUsageDescription: FAMILIA uses your photo library to upload medical document images.
infoPlist.NSHealthShareUsageDescription: FAMILIA reads health data from Apple Health to give you a complete picture of your health.
infoPlist.NSHealthUpdateUsageDescription: FAMILIA does not write to Apple Health.

plugins.faceIDPermission: FAMILIA uses Face ID to unlock the app and protect your health data.
